Jiaxuan Project — Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3 Cohort

Author

Tianqi Ouyang

Published

April 9, 2026

1 Setup

Code 
# Force UTF-8 locale so kable captions and other strings render real Unicode
# (e.g. em-dash) instead of <U+2014> escape sequences.
invisible(Sys.setlocale("LC_ALL", "en_US.UTF-8"))
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidycmprsk)
library(ggsurvfit)
library(gtsummary)
library(flextable)
library(rvg)
library(officer)

# Output directory for downloadable Word tables
docx_dir <- "docs/tables/auc3"
dir.create(docx_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Output directory for editable PowerPoint copies of every figure. A knitr
# plot hook (defined below) saves last_plot() to docs/pptx/auc3/<label>.pptx
# and appends a download link after the figure in the rendered HTML.
dir.create("docs/pptx/auc3", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
pptx_dir <- normalizePath("docs/pptx/auc3", mustWork = TRUE)
pptx_rel_prefix <- "../pptx/auc3/"

.pptx_written <- new.env()

knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.process = function(filename) {
  label <- knitr::opts_current$get("label")
  if (is.null(label)) return(filename)
  p <- tryCatch(ggplot2::last_plot(), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(p) || !inherits(p, "ggplot")) return(filename)
  pptx_path <- file.path(pptx_dir, paste0(label, ".pptx"))
  tryCatch({
    doc <- officer::read_pptx()
    doc <- officer::add_slide(doc, layout = "Title and Content",
                              master = "Office Theme")
    doc <- officer::ph_with(doc, rvg::dml(ggobj = p),
                            location = officer::ph_location_type(type = "body"))
    print(doc, target = pptx_path)
    .pptx_written[[label]] <- paste0(pptx_rel_prefix, label, ".pptx")
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
  filename
})

local({
  default_chunk_hook <- knitr::knit_hooks$get("chunk")
  knitr::knit_hooks$set(chunk = function(x, options) {
    out <- default_chunk_hook(x, options)
    label <- options$label
    if (!is.null(label) && !is.null(.pptx_written[[label]])) {
      rel <- .pptx_written[[label]]
      link <- sprintf(
        '\n\n<p style="margin-top:-0.5em;font-size:0.9em;"><a href="%s" download>📊 Download as PowerPoint (editable)</a></p>\n\n',
        rel)
      out <- paste0(out, link)
    }
    out
  })
})

save_tbl_docx <- function(tbl, docx_name) {
  ft <- gtsummary::as_flex_table(tbl)
  flextable::save_as_docx(ft, path = file.path(docx_dir,
                                               paste0(docx_name, ".docx")))
  invisible(tbl)
}

# Load whole-cohort data, then keep only carboplatin patients
dat <- readRDS("jiaxuan_final_master.rds") %>%
  filter(platin_group == "Carboplatin", carbo_AUC >= 3)

# Create eGFR ratio: CKD-EPI Cr-Cys (unindexed) / Cockcroft-Gault
# Also create per-10 mL/min rescaled versions of cockcroft and CKD-EPI for
# reporting (HRs per 1 mL/min are clinically uninterpretable; convention in
# nephro-onc is per 10 mL/min — bio_agent confirmed). Adjusters keep raw scale.
dat <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    # Capped versions (for dose discrepancy calculations)
    cockcroft_cap125 = pmin(cockcroft, 125),
    # ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex_cap125 already exists in data
    # Ratio uses UNCAPPED eGFR
    egfr_ratio    = ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex / cockcroft,
    egfr_ratio_per10 = -egfr_ratio * 10,  # per 0.1-unit *decrease* reporting scale
    egfr_discrepancy = ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex - cockcroft,
    # per-10-mL/min DECLINE reporting scale for eGFR discrepancy: HR for this
    # variable reads as the multiplicative change in subHR per 10 mL/min lower
    # discrepancy (i.e., when CKD-EPI Cr-Cys is 10 mL/min farther below CG).
    egfr_disc_per10dec = -egfr_discrepancy / 10,
    # Sensitivity-analysis eGFR ratio (Section 16):
    # numerator = CKD-EPI 2012 cystatin C only (baseline_cys_c_egfr_unindexed)
    # denominator = CKD-EPI 2021 race-free creatinine only (baseline_cre_egfr_unindexed)
    # per10 below is the per-0.1 DECLINE reporting scale.
    egfr_ratio_sens       = baseline_cys_c_egfr_unindexed / baseline_cre_egfr_unindexed,
    egfr_ratio_sens_per10 = -egfr_ratio_sens * 10,
    # Dose discrepancy uses CAPPED eGFR (already computed in jiaxuan_data.qmd)
    dose_discrep_per25increase = dose_discrepancy / 25,
    abs_dose_discrep = abs(dose_discrepancy),
    abs_dose_discrep_cat = cut(abs_dose_discrep,
      breaks = c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100, Inf),
      labels = c("<25", "25-49.99", "50-74.99", "75-99.99", ">=100"),
      right = FALSE, include.lowest = TRUE),
    # Binary exposure for adjusted CIF curves (Section 14): 1 if patient was
    # over-dosed by 25 mg or more (actual - predicted >= 25), else 0.
    dose_discrep_ge25 = as.integer(dose_discrepancy >= 25),
    # Signed dose discrepancy = actual - predicted; 10 bins symmetric around 0.
    signed_dose_discrep_cat = cut(dose_discrepancy,
      breaks = c(-Inf, -100, -75, -50, -25, 0, 25, 50, 75, 100, Inf),
      labels = c("<=-100", "-99.99 to -75", "-74.99 to -50",
                 "-49.99 to -25", "-24.99 to 0",
                 "0 to 24.99", "25 to 49.99", "50 to 74.99",
                 "75 to 99.99", ">=100"),
      right = FALSE, include.lowest = TRUE),
    cockcroft_per10 = cockcroft / 10,
    ckd_epi_per10   = ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex / 10
  )

cat("Carboplatin AUC >= 3 cohort N =", nrow(dat), "\n")
Carboplatin AUC >= 3 cohort N = 463

2 Actual vs Predicted Dose (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)

Code 
dose_long <- dat %>%
  select(record_id, carbo_dose_redcap, carbo_dose_cre_cys) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(carbo_dose_redcap, carbo_dose_cre_cys),
    names_to = "dose_type", values_to = "dose_mg"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(dose_mg)) %>%
  mutate(dose_type = case_match(dose_type,
    "carbo_dose_redcap"  ~ "Actual (REDCap)",
    "carbo_dose_cre_cys" ~ "Predicted (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys)"
  ))

ggplot(dose_long, aes(x = dose_mg, fill = dose_type)) +
  geom_histogram(alpha = 0.5, bins = 40, position = "identity", color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Actual (REDCap)" = "#E31A1C",
                                "Predicted (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys)" = "#1F78B4")) +
  labs(title = "Carboplatin Dose Distribution (AUC ≥ 3)",
       x = "Dose (mg)", y = "Number of Patients", fill = "Dose Type") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)

2.2 Signed Dose Discrepancy Distribution

Smooth kernel density estimate of the signed dose discrepancy (actual − predicted, CKD-EPI Cr-Cys). The area under the curve is shaded by sign — negative (under-dosed region) on one side, positive on the other.

Code 
dose_vals <- dat %>%
  filter(!is.na(dose_discrepancy)) %>%
  pull(dose_discrepancy)

dens <- density(dose_vals, n = 512)
y_at_zero <- approx(dens$x, dens$y, xout = 0)$y

dens_df <- tibble(x = dens$x, y = dens$y) %>%
  bind_rows(tibble(x = 0, y = y_at_zero)) %>%
  arrange(x)

neg_part <- dens_df %>% filter(x <= 0) %>% mutate(side = "neg")
pos_part <- dens_df %>% filter(x >= 0) %>% mutate(side = "pos")
plot_df  <- bind_rows(neg_part, pos_part)

ggplot() +
  geom_area(data = plot_df, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = side), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_line(data = dens_df, aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.6, color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(neg = "#E31A1C", pos = "#1F78B4"),
                    guide = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-250, 250), ylim = c(0, 0.010)) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Signed Dose Discrepancy (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)",
       x = "Dose Discrepancy (mg) = Actual dose – Predicted dose",
       y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)

3 Table 1: Baseline Characteristics (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)

Code 
dat %>%
  dplyr::select(
    age, age_cat, sex, race, ethnicity, tumor_stage, cancer_type_cat_7,
    carbo_AUC, carbo_AUC_cat,
    ici, Bevacizumab, Paclitaxel, Pemetrexed, Doxorubicin, Etoposide,
    Gemcitabine, Pertuzumab, Trastuzumab, Docetaxel, other_chemo, Administered_alone,
    hiv_rpdr, thyroid, smoking, steroids,
    cci, score, ecog_score, bmi, bmi_cat,
    pre_HGB_45days, pre_PLT_45days, pre_ALB_45days,
    baseline_cys_c, baseline_cre, cr_cys,
    baseline_cre_egfr, baseline_cys_c_egfr,
    ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys, ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex,
    cockcroft, egfr_ratio
  ) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    statistic = list(age ~ "{mean} ({sd})")
  )

3.1 Follow-up time (days from baseline to last known status)

days_last_follow_up = last_follow_up_date − baseline_sample_date; analytic window capped at 90 days. Patients whose last known status is < 90 days from baseline are treated as lost to follow-up (LTFU).

Code 
followup_summary <- dat %>%
  dplyr::select(record_id, days_last_follow_up) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(days_last_follow_up) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(reached_90 = ifelse(days_last_follow_up >= 90, 1, 0))

followup_tbl <- followup_summary %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Group = "Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3",
    N            = dplyr::n(),
    `Median [IQR] follow-up (days)` = sprintf("%.0f [%.0f, %.0f]",
      median(days_last_follow_up),
      quantile(days_last_follow_up, 0.25),
      quantile(days_last_follow_up, 0.75)),
    `Reached 90 days, N (%)`   = sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)",
      sum(reached_90 == 1), 100 * mean(reached_90 == 1)),
    `LTFU before 90 days, N (%)` = sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)",
      sum(reached_90 == 0), 100 * mean(reached_90 == 0))
  )

flextable::flextable(followup_tbl) |>
  flextable::set_caption("Follow-up time from baseline to last known status (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3 cohort).") |>
  flextable::autofit()

Group

N

Median [IQR] follow-up (days)

Reached 90 days, N (%)

LTFU before 90 days, N (%)

4 eGFR Ratio Distribution (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)

Code 
ratio_hist <- dat %>%
  filter(!is.na(egfr_ratio)) %>%
  mutate(side = ifelse(egfr_ratio < 1, "neg", "pos"))

ggplot(ratio_hist, aes(x = egfr_ratio, fill = side)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(count) / sum(after_stat(count)) * 100),
                 binwidth = 0.1, boundary = 0,
                 color = "black", alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(neg = "#E31A1C", pos = "grey60"),
                    guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of eGFR Ratio (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)",
       x = "eGFR Ratio",
       y = "Percent of Patients (%)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 3, 0.2)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)

5 Fine-Gray Models — eGFR Ratio (adjusted for Cockcroft-Gault) (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)

Each table below shows univariable (one variable at a time) and multivariable Fine-Gray subdistribution hazard ratios side-by-side. A Word version of every table is saved during render — click any link below to download:

  • Anemia Grade 2 · Anemia Grade 3
  • Thrombocytopenia Grade 2 · Thrombocytopenia Grade 3
  • AKI Grade 2 · AKI (KDIGO)
  • Composite Grade 2 AEs · Composite Grade 3 AEs
  • Overall Hospitalization · Platinum-Related Hospitalization
  • 90-Day Death (Cox PH)
Code 
.adj_set <- function(pre_labs, egfr_adj) {
  adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2",
           "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","high_dose",
           "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
           "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  if (egfr_adj == "cockcroft") adj <- c(adj, "cockcroft")
  if (egfr_adj == "ckd_epi")   adj <- c(adj, "ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex")
  if (!is.null(pre_labs)) adj <- c(adj, pre_labs)
  adj
}

# fg_model: returns univariable + multivariable merged Fine-Gray table.
# If docx_name is supplied, also saves the table as a .docx in docx_dir.
fg_model <- function(time_var, status_var, pred_var, pre_labs = NULL,
                     egfr_adj = c("none", "cockcroft", "ckd_epi"),
                     docx_name = NULL) {
  egfr_adj <- match.arg(egfr_adj)
  adj <- .adj_set(pre_labs, egfr_adj)
  all_vars <- c(pred_var, adj)

  fmla_mv <- as.formula(paste0(
    "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var, ") ~ ",
    paste(all_vars, collapse = " + ")
  ))
  tbl_mv <- tidycmprsk::crr(fmla_mv, failcode = 1, data = dat) %>%
    tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,
                   pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3)) %>%
    add_n()

  y_call <- str2lang(sprintf("Surv(%s, %s)", time_var, status_var))
  tbl_uv <- rlang::inject(
    tbl_uvregression(
      data = dat,
      method = tidycmprsk::crr,
      y = !!y_call,
      include = dplyr::all_of(all_vars),
      exponentiate = TRUE,
      pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3),
      method.args = list(failcode = 1)
    )
  )

  out <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(tbl_uv, tbl_mv),
    tab_spanner = c("**Univariable**", "**Multivariable**")
  )

  if (!is.null(docx_name)) save_tbl_docx(out, docx_name)
  out
}

cox_model <- function(time_var, status_var, pred_var, pre_labs = NULL,
                      egfr_adj = c("none", "cockcroft", "ckd_epi"),
                      docx_name = NULL) {
  egfr_adj <- match.arg(egfr_adj)
  adj <- .adj_set(pre_labs, egfr_adj)
  all_vars <- c(pred_var, adj)

  fmla_mv <- as.formula(paste0(
    "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var, ") ~ ",
    paste(all_vars, collapse = " + ")
  ))
  tbl_mv <- survival::coxph(fmla_mv, data = dat) %>%
    tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,
                   pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3)) %>%
    add_n()

  y_call <- str2lang(sprintf("Surv(%s, %s)", time_var, status_var))
  tbl_uv <- rlang::inject(
    tbl_uvregression(
      data = dat,
      method = survival::coxph,
      y = !!y_call,
      include = dplyr::all_of(all_vars),
      exponentiate = TRUE,
      pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3)
    )
  )

  out <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(tbl_uv, tbl_mv),
    tab_spanner = c("**Univariable**", "**Multivariable**")
  )

  if (!is.null(docx_name)) save_tbl_docx(out, docx_name)
  out
}

1 HR = Hazard Ratio, CI = Confidence Interval

6 Cause-Specific Hazard Models — eGFR Ratio (adjusted for Cockcroft-Gault) (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)

Code 
csh_model <- function(time_var, status_var, pred_var, pre_labs = NULL) {
  adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2",
           "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","high_dose",
           "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
           "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid","cockcroft")
  if (!is.null(pre_labs)) adj <- c(adj, pre_labs)
  d <- dat
  d$csh_status <- ifelse(d[[status_var]] == 1, 1L, 0L)
  fmla <- as.formula(paste0(
    "Surv(", time_var, ", csh_status) ~ ",
    paste(c(pred_var, adj), collapse = " + ")
  ))
  survival::coxph(fmla, data = d) %>%
    tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,
                   pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3)) %>%
    add_n()
}

1 HR = Hazard Ratio, CI = Confidence Interval
NoteWhy anchor at the median (subHR = 1 at the reference)

Three reasons to anchor at the median:

  1. Interpretability: “A patient with eGFR ratio of 0.8 has ~1.5× the subHR compared to a typical patient (at the median).”
  2. Stability: The median sits in the densest part of the data, so estimates near it have the tightest confidence intervals. The CIs fan out as you move away — you can see this in the plots.
  3. No arbitrary choice: If we picked 1.0 arbitrarily, the plot would look almost identical here (because median ≈ 1), but in cohorts where the median is 0.9 or 1.1, picking 1.0 would either shift or distort the curve without changing the actual model.

9 Linear subHR Curves — eGFR Ratio (raw scale) (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)

Notep-value convention

The p-value shown in each panel subtitle below is Bonferroni-adjusted across the six primary manuscript-figure AE outcomes (platinum-related hospitalisation, overall hospitalisation, 90-day mortality, grade ≥ 3 anemia, grade ≥ 3 thrombocytopenia, acute kidney injury): p_Bonf = min(raw p × 6, 1). n = 6 is displayed alongside for transparency. Raw Wald p is preserved in the Section 5 regression tables and their downloadable Word versions.

Code 
plot_subhr_linear_ratio <- function(time_var, status_var, extra_adj = NULL,
                                    outcome_label, n_bonf = 6) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2","cockcroft",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  keep <- c("egfr_ratio", time_var, status_var, base_adj, extra_adj)
  d <- dat %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  adj_df <- d[, c(base_adj, extra_adj), drop = FALSE]
  X_adj <- model.matrix(~ ., data = adj_df)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  X <- cbind(egfr_ratio = d$egfr_ratio, X_adj)

  stat_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(d[[status_var]])))
  time_num <- as.numeric(d[[time_var]])

  fit <- cmprsk::crr(ftime = time_num, fstatus = stat_num,
                     cov1 = X, failcode = 1)

  beta   <- fit$coef[1]
  V_beta <- fit$var[1, 1]
  se_b   <- sqrt(V_beta)

  q1    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_ratio, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))
  q3    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_ratio, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
  iqr_w <- q3 - q1
  hr01  <- exp(-0.1 * beta);     hr01_l <- exp(-0.1 * beta - 1.96 * 0.1 * se_b);   hr01_u <- exp(-0.1 * beta + 1.96 * 0.1 * se_b)
  hri   <- exp(-iqr_w * beta);   hri_l  <- exp(-iqr_w * beta - 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b); hri_u <- exp(-iqr_w * beta + 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b)
  pval  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(beta / se_b)))
  pval_bonf <- min(pval * n_bonf, 1)
  p_shown <- if (n_bonf > 1) pval_bonf else pval
  p_lbl   <- if (n_bonf > 1) sprintf("p_Bonf = %s (n = %d)", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)), n_bonf) else sprintf("p = %s", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)))
  subtitle_str <- sprintf(
    "subHR per 0.1 ratio decline: %.2f (%.2f-%.2f), %s  |  per IQR decline (Δ = %.2f): %.2f (%.2f-%.2f)  |  IQR: [%.2f, %.2f]",
    hr01, hr01_l, hr01_u, p_lbl, iqr_w, hri, hri_l, hri_u, q1, q3)

  ref_x  <- median(d$egfr_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
  grid_x <- seq(quantile(d$egfr_ratio, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
                quantile(d$egfr_ratio, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100)

  log_hr <- beta * (grid_x - ref_x)
  se     <- sqrt((grid_x - ref_x)^2 * V_beta)

  df_plot <- tibble(
    x     = grid_x,
    subhr = exp(log_hr),
    lcl   = exp(log_hr - 1.96 * se),
    ucl   = exp(log_hr + 1.96 * se)
  )

  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = x, y = subhr)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lcl, ymax = ucl), alpha = 0.2, fill = "darkorange") +
    geom_line(color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = ref_x, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey40") +
    labs(x = "CKD-EPI Cr-Cys / CG ratio",
         y = "subHR (95% CI)",
         title = outcome_label,
         subtitle = subtitle_str) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.65, 1.45), ylim = c(0, 4)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey25"))
}

plot_cox_linear_ratio <- function(time_var, status_var, extra_adj = NULL,
                                  outcome_label, n_bonf = 6) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2","cockcroft",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  keep <- c("egfr_ratio", time_var, status_var, base_adj, extra_adj)
  d <- dat %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  fmla <- as.formula(paste0(
    "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var, ") ~ egfr_ratio + ",
    paste(c(base_adj, extra_adj), collapse = " + ")
  ))
  fit <- survival::coxph(fmla, data = d)

  beta   <- coef(fit)["egfr_ratio"]
  V_beta <- vcov(fit)["egfr_ratio", "egfr_ratio"]
  se_b   <- sqrt(V_beta)

  q1    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_ratio, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))
  q3    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_ratio, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
  iqr_w <- q3 - q1
  hr01  <- exp(-0.1 * beta);     hr01_l <- exp(-0.1 * beta - 1.96 * 0.1 * se_b);   hr01_u <- exp(-0.1 * beta + 1.96 * 0.1 * se_b)
  hri   <- exp(-iqr_w * beta);   hri_l  <- exp(-iqr_w * beta - 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b); hri_u <- exp(-iqr_w * beta + 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b)
  pval  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(beta / se_b)))
  pval_bonf <- min(pval * n_bonf, 1)
  p_shown <- if (n_bonf > 1) pval_bonf else pval
  p_lbl   <- if (n_bonf > 1) sprintf("p_Bonf = %s (n = %d)", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)), n_bonf) else sprintf("p = %s", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)))
  subtitle_str <- sprintf(
    "HR per 0.1 ratio decline: %.2f (%.2f-%.2f), %s  |  per IQR decline (Δ = %.2f): %.2f (%.2f-%.2f)  |  IQR: [%.2f, %.2f]",
    hr01, hr01_l, hr01_u, p_lbl, iqr_w, hri, hri_l, hri_u, q1, q3)

  ref_x  <- median(d$egfr_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
  grid_x <- seq(quantile(d$egfr_ratio, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
                quantile(d$egfr_ratio, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100)

  log_hr <- beta * (grid_x - ref_x)
  se     <- sqrt((grid_x - ref_x)^2 * V_beta)

  df_plot <- tibble(
    x   = grid_x,
    hr  = exp(log_hr),
    lcl = exp(log_hr - 1.96 * se),
    ucl = exp(log_hr + 1.96 * se)
  )

  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = x, y = hr)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lcl, ymax = ucl), alpha = 0.2, fill = "darkorange") +
    geom_line(color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = ref_x, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey40") +
    labs(x = "CKD-EPI Cr-Cys / CG ratio",
         y = "HR (95% CI)",
         title = outcome_label,
         subtitle = subtitle_str) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.65, 1.45), ylim = c(0, 4)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey25"))
}

8.1 Anemia Grade 2

Code 
plot_subhr_linear_ratio("cmp_time_anemia_2", "cmp_status_anemia_2",
                        "pre_HGB_45days", "Anemia Grade 2 (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)")

                      NULL, "90-Day Death (Cox PH) (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)")

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)

10 Linear subHR Curves — eGFR Discrepancy (raw scale) (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)

10.0 Summary table: Fine-Gray subHR per 10 mL/min decline in eGFR discrepancy

One row per outcome. Multivariable Fine-Gray model fit with egfr_disc_per10dec = -egfr_discrepancy / 10 (positive when CKD-EPI Cr-Cys is below CG) plus the same adjusters used by the curves below (no platin_group in the AUC ≥ 3 cohort). The HR for egfr_disc_per10dec is the multiplicative change in subHR per 10 mL/min lower eGFR discrepancy. 90-day death uses Cox PH. p-values in this summary table are raw Wald (not Bonferroni-adjusted); the plot subtitles in Sections 10.1–10.11 apply Bonferroni correction across the six primary AE outcomes.

📄 Download Word table

Code 
.disc_adj_set <- function(pre_labs = NULL) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  if (!is.null(pre_labs)) base_adj <- c(base_adj, pre_labs)
  base_adj
}

fg_disc_row <- function(time_var, status_var, label, pre_labs = NULL) {
  adj <- .disc_adj_set(pre_labs)
  d <- dat %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c("egfr_disc_per10dec", time_var, status_var, adj))) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na()
  adj_df <- d[, adj, drop = FALSE]
  X_adj  <- model.matrix(~ ., data = adj_df)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  X      <- cbind(egfr_disc_per10dec = d$egfr_disc_per10dec, X_adj)
  stat_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(d[[status_var]])))
  time_num <- as.numeric(d[[time_var]])
  fit <- cmprsk::crr(time_num, stat_num, cov1 = X, failcode = 1)
  b <- unname(fit$coef[1]); se <- sqrt(fit$var[1, 1])
  hr <- exp(b); lcl <- exp(b - 1.96 * se); ucl <- exp(b + 1.96 * se)
  pv <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(b / se)))
  tibble(
    Outcome = label,
    Model   = "Fine-Gray",
    N       = nrow(d),
    `Excluded (missing cov.)` = nrow(dat) - nrow(d),
    Events  = sum(stat_num == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    `(sub)HR (95% CI)` = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)", hr, lcl, ucl),
    `p-value` = ifelse(pv < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", pv))
  )
}

cox_disc_row <- function(time_var, status_var, label, pre_labs = NULL) {
  adj <- .disc_adj_set(pre_labs)
  d <- dat %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c("egfr_disc_per10dec", time_var, status_var, adj))) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na()
  fmla <- as.formula(paste0("Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var,
                            ") ~ egfr_disc_per10dec + ",
                            paste(adj, collapse = " + ")))
  fit <- survival::coxph(fmla, data = d)
  b   <- unname(coef(fit)["egfr_disc_per10dec"])
  se  <- sqrt(vcov(fit)["egfr_disc_per10dec", "egfr_disc_per10dec"])
  hr  <- exp(b); lcl <- exp(b - 1.96 * se); ucl <- exp(b + 1.96 * se)
  pv  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(b / se)))
  tibble(
    Outcome = label,
    Model   = "Cox PH",
    N       = nrow(d),
    `Excluded (missing cov.)` = nrow(dat) - nrow(d),
    Events  = sum(d[[status_var]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    `(sub)HR (95% CI)` = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)", hr, lcl, ucl),
    `p-value` = ifelse(pv < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", pv))
  )
}

disc_summary <- bind_rows(
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_anemia_2",     "cmp_status_anemia_2",     "Anemia Grade 2",                   "pre_HGB_45days"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_anemia_3",     "cmp_status_anemia_3",     "Anemia Grade 3",                   "pre_HGB_45days"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_throm_2",      "cmp_status_throm_2",      "Thrombocytopenia Grade 2",         "pre_PLT_45days"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_throm_3",      "cmp_status_throm_3",      "Thrombocytopenia Grade 3",         "pre_PLT_45days"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_aki_2",        "cmp_status_aki_2",        "AKI Grade 2"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_aki_kdigo",    "cmp_status_aki_kdigo",    "AKI (KDIGO)"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_grade_2_aes",  "cmp_status_grade_2_aes",  "Composite Grade 2 AEs"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_grade_3_aes",  "cmp_status_grade_3_aes",  "Composite Grade 3 AEs"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_any_hosp",     "cmp_status_any_hosp",     "Overall Hospitalization"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_side_effect",  "cmp_status_side_effect",  "Platinum-Related Hospitalization"),
  cox_disc_row("time_to_death_90",      "death_90",                "90-Day Death")
)

ft_disc <- flextable::flextable(disc_summary) |>
  flextable::set_caption("Multivariable (sub)HR per 10 mL/min decline in eGFR discrepancy (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys − Cockcroft-Gault) — Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3 cohort. Fine-Gray for competing-risk outcomes; Cox PH for 90-day death.") |>
  flextable::autofit()
flextable::save_as_docx(ft_disc,
  path = file.path(docx_dir, "sec10_disc_summary.docx"))

Code 
plot_subhr_linear_egfrdisc <- function(time_var, status_var, extra_adj = NULL,
                                       outcome_label, n_bonf = 6) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  keep <- c("egfr_discrepancy", time_var, status_var, base_adj, extra_adj)
  d <- dat %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  adj_df <- d[, c(base_adj, extra_adj), drop = FALSE]
  X_adj <- model.matrix(~ ., data = adj_df)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  X <- cbind(egfr_discrepancy = d$egfr_discrepancy, X_adj)

  stat_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(d[[status_var]])))
  time_num <- as.numeric(d[[time_var]])

  fit <- cmprsk::crr(ftime = time_num, fstatus = stat_num,
                     cov1 = X, failcode = 1)

  beta   <- fit$coef[1]
  V_beta <- fit$var[1, 1]
  se_b   <- sqrt(V_beta)

  q1    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))
  q3    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
  iqr_w <- q3 - q1
  hr10  <- exp(-10 * beta);       hr10_l <- exp(-10 * beta - 1.96 * 10 * se_b);     hr10_u <- exp(-10 * beta + 1.96 * 10 * se_b)
  hri   <- exp(-iqr_w * beta);    hri_l <- exp(-iqr_w * beta - 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b); hri_u <- exp(-iqr_w * beta + 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b)
  pval  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(beta / se_b)))
  pval_bonf <- min(pval * n_bonf, 1)
  p_shown <- if (n_bonf > 1) pval_bonf else pval
  p_lbl   <- if (n_bonf > 1) sprintf("p_Bonf = %s (n = %d)", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)), n_bonf) else sprintf("p = %s", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)))
  subtitle_str <- sprintf(
    "subHR per 10 mL/min decline: %.2f (%.2f-%.2f), %s  |  per IQR decline (Δ = %.1f): %.2f (%.2f-%.2f)  |  IQR: [%.1f, %.1f]",
    hr10, hr10_l, hr10_u, p_lbl, iqr_w, hri, hri_l, hri_u, q1, q3)

  ref_x  <- median(d$egfr_discrepancy, na.rm = TRUE)
  grid_x <- seq(quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
                quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100)

  log_hr <- beta * (grid_x - ref_x)
  se     <- sqrt((grid_x - ref_x)^2 * V_beta)

  df_plot <- tibble(
    x     = grid_x,
    subhr = exp(log_hr),
    lcl   = exp(log_hr - 1.96 * se),
    ucl   = exp(log_hr + 1.96 * se)
  )

  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = x, y = subhr)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lcl, ymax = ucl), alpha = 0.2, fill = "darkorange") +
    geom_line(color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = ref_x, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey40") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(q1, q3), linetype = "dashed",
               color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    labs(x = "eGFR Discrepancy (mL/min)",
         y = "subHR (95% CI)",
         title = outcome_label,
         subtitle = subtitle_str) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey25"))
}

plot_cox_linear_egfrdisc <- function(time_var, status_var, extra_adj = NULL,
                                     outcome_label, n_bonf = 6) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  keep <- c("egfr_discrepancy", time_var, status_var, base_adj, extra_adj)
  d <- dat %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  fmla <- as.formula(paste0(
    "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var, ") ~ egfr_discrepancy + ",
    paste(c(base_adj, extra_adj), collapse = " + ")
  ))
  fit <- survival::coxph(fmla, data = d)

  beta   <- coef(fit)["egfr_discrepancy"]
  V_beta <- vcov(fit)["egfr_discrepancy", "egfr_discrepancy"]
  se_b   <- sqrt(V_beta)

  q1    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))
  q3    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
  iqr_w <- q3 - q1
  hr10  <- exp(-10 * beta);       hr10_l <- exp(-10 * beta - 1.96 * 10 * se_b);     hr10_u <- exp(-10 * beta + 1.96 * 10 * se_b)
  hri   <- exp(-iqr_w * beta);    hri_l <- exp(-iqr_w * beta - 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b); hri_u <- exp(-iqr_w * beta + 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b)
  pval  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(beta / se_b)))
  pval_bonf <- min(pval * n_bonf, 1)
  p_shown <- if (n_bonf > 1) pval_bonf else pval
  p_lbl   <- if (n_bonf > 1) sprintf("p_Bonf = %s (n = %d)", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)), n_bonf) else sprintf("p = %s", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)))
  subtitle_str <- sprintf(
    "HR per 10 mL/min decline: %.2f (%.2f-%.2f), %s  |  per IQR decline (Δ = %.1f): %.2f (%.2f-%.2f)  |  IQR: [%.1f, %.1f]",
    hr10, hr10_l, hr10_u, p_lbl, iqr_w, hri, hri_l, hri_u, q1, q3)

  ref_x  <- median(d$egfr_discrepancy, na.rm = TRUE)
  grid_x <- seq(quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
                quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100)

  log_hr <- beta * (grid_x - ref_x)
  se     <- sqrt((grid_x - ref_x)^2 * V_beta)

  df_plot <- tibble(
    x   = grid_x,
    hr  = exp(log_hr),
    lcl = exp(log_hr - 1.96 * se),
    ucl = exp(log_hr + 1.96 * se)
  )

  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = x, y = hr)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lcl, ymax = ucl), alpha = 0.2, fill = "darkorange") +
    geom_line(color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = ref_x, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey40") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(q1, q3), linetype = "dashed",
               color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    labs(x = "eGFR Discrepancy (mL/min)",
         y = "HR (95% CI)",
         title = outcome_label,
         subtitle = subtitle_str) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey25"))
}

11 Linear subHR Curves — Dose Discrepancy (raw scale) (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)

Code 
plot_subhr_linear <- function(time_var, status_var, extra_adj = NULL,
                              outcome_label) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2","cockcroft",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  keep <- c("dose_discrepancy", time_var, status_var, base_adj, extra_adj)
  d <- dat %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  adj_df <- d[, c(base_adj, extra_adj), drop = FALSE]
  X_adj <- model.matrix(~ ., data = adj_df)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  X <- cbind(dose_discrepancy = d$dose_discrepancy, X_adj)

  stat_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(d[[status_var]])))
  time_num <- as.numeric(d[[time_var]])

  fit <- cmprsk::crr(ftime = time_num, fstatus = stat_num,
                     cov1 = X, failcode = 1)

  beta   <- fit$coef[1]
  V_beta <- fit$var[1, 1]

  ref_x  <- median(d$dose_discrepancy, na.rm = TRUE)
  grid_x <- seq(quantile(d$dose_discrepancy, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
                quantile(d$dose_discrepancy, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100)

  log_hr <- beta * (grid_x - ref_x)
  se     <- sqrt((grid_x - ref_x)^2 * V_beta)

  df_plot <- tibble(
    x     = grid_x,
    subhr = exp(log_hr),
    lcl   = exp(log_hr - 1.96 * se),
    ucl   = exp(log_hr + 1.96 * se)
  )

  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = x, y = subhr)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lcl, ymax = ucl), alpha = 0.2, fill = "darkorange") +
    geom_line(color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = ref_x, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey40") +
    labs(x = "Dose Discrepancy (mg)",
         y = "subHR (95% CI)",
         title = outcome_label) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11)
}

plot_cox_linear <- function(time_var, status_var, extra_adj = NULL,
                            outcome_label) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2","cockcroft",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  keep <- c("dose_discrepancy", time_var, status_var, base_adj, extra_adj)
  d <- dat %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  fmla <- as.formula(paste0(
    "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var, ") ~ dose_discrepancy + ",
    paste(c(base_adj, extra_adj), collapse = " + ")
  ))
  fit <- survival::coxph(fmla, data = d)

  beta   <- coef(fit)["dose_discrepancy"]
  V_beta <- vcov(fit)["dose_discrepancy", "dose_discrepancy"]

  ref_x  <- median(d$dose_discrepancy, na.rm = TRUE)
  grid_x <- seq(quantile(d$dose_discrepancy, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
                quantile(d$dose_discrepancy, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100)

  log_hr <- beta * (grid_x - ref_x)
  se     <- sqrt((grid_x - ref_x)^2 * V_beta)

  df_plot <- tibble(
    x   = grid_x,
    hr  = exp(log_hr),
    lcl = exp(log_hr - 1.96 * se),
    ucl = exp(log_hr + 1.96 * se)
  )

  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = x, y = hr)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lcl, ymax = ucl), alpha = 0.2, fill = "darkorange") +
    geom_line(color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = ref_x, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey40") +
    labs(x = "Dose Discrepancy (mg)",
         y = "HR (95% CI)",
         title = outcome_label) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11)
}

                  "pre_HGB_45days", "Anemia Grade 2 (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)")

10.8 Composite Grade 3 AEs

ggplot(dat %>% filter(!is.na(dose_discrepancy)),
       aes(x = ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex, y = dose_discrepancy)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(x = "CKD-EPI Cr-Cys eGFR (unindexed, mL/min)",
       y = "Dose Discrepancy (mg)",
       title = "Dose Discrepancy vs CKD-EPI Cr-Cys eGFR (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)

13.2 Dose Discrepancy vs Cockcroft-Gault

Code 
ggplot(dat %>% filter(!is.na(dose_discrepancy)),
       aes(x = cockcroft, y = dose_discrepancy)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(x = "Cockcroft-Gault eGFR (mL/min)",
       y = "Dose Discrepancy (mg)",
       title = "Dose Discrepancy vs Cockcroft-Gault eGFR (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)

14 Adjusted CIF — Dose Discrepancy >= +25 mg (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)

Standardized cumulative incidence functions for each competing-risk outcome, contrasting patients with dose_discrepancy >= 25 (red) against those with dose_discrepancy < 25 (blue). The Fine-Gray model is fit with the binary exposure plus the same adjuster set used in Section 7. Curves are adjusted (standardized) via g-computation: for every patient, predict CIF under exposure = 1 and under exposure = 0, then average the two CIF curves over the cohort. Y-axis is cumulative incidence, x-axis is days from baseline.

90-day death (Section 14.11) is modelled with Cox PH instead of Fine-Gray (no competing event), and the standardized cumulative-incidence-of-death curve is 1 − S(t|Xᵢ) averaged across the cohort.

Code 
adj_cif <- function(time_var, status_var, extra_pre = NULL, label) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid","cockcroft")
  vars <- c("dose_discrep_ge25", base_adj, extra_pre)
  d <- dat %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c(time_var, status_var, vars))) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na()

  fmla <- as.formula(paste("~",
            paste(c("dose_discrep_ge25", base_adj, extra_pre), collapse = " + ")))
  X_full <- model.matrix(fmla, data = d)[, -1, drop = FALSE]

  stat_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(d[[status_var]])))
  time_num <- as.numeric(d[[time_var]])

  fit <- cmprsk::crr(ftime = time_num, fstatus = stat_num,
                     cov1 = X_full, failcode = 1)

  # subHR (95% CI) for the binary exposure, extracted from the same FG fit
  # dose_discrep_ge25 is the first column of cov1 (entered first in the formula)
  beta_e <- unname(fit$coef[1])
  se_e   <- sqrt(fit$var[1, 1])
  hr     <- exp(beta_e)
  lcl    <- exp(beta_e - 1.96 * se_e)
  ucl    <- exp(beta_e + 1.96 * se_e)
  pval   <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(beta_e / se_e)))
  p_str  <- ifelse(pval < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", pval))
  subtitle_str <- sprintf(
    "Discrep >= +25 vs <+25: subHR = %.2f (95%% CI %.2f-%.2f), p = %s",
    hr, lcl, ucl, p_str
  )

  X0 <- X_full; X0[, "dose_discrep_ge25"] <- 0
  X1 <- X_full; X1[, "dose_discrep_ge25"] <- 1

  pred0 <- predict(fit, X0)
  pred1 <- predict(fit, X1)

  times <- pred0[, 1]
  cif0  <- rowMeans(pred0[, -1, drop = FALSE])
  cif1  <- rowMeans(pred1[, -1, drop = FALSE])

  df <- bind_rows(
    tibble(time = times, cif = cif0, group = "Discrep < +25 mg"),
    tibble(time = times, cif = cif1, group = "Discrep >= +25 mg")
  )

  ymax <- max(df$cif, na.rm = TRUE)

  ggplot(df, aes(x = time, y = cif, color = group)) +
    geom_step(linewidth = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Discrep < +25 mg"  = "#1F78B4",
                                  "Discrep >= +25 mg" = "#E31A1C")) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, max(0.05, ymax * 1.05))) +
    labs(x = "Days from baseline",
         y = "Cumulative incidence",
         color = NULL,
         title = label,
         subtitle = subtitle_str) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(legend.position = "top",
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey25"))
}

adj_death_curve <- function(time_var = "time_to_death_90",
                            status_var = "death_90", label) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid","cockcroft")
  vars <- c("dose_discrep_ge25", base_adj)
  d <- dat %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c(time_var, status_var, vars))) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na()

  rhs <- paste(c("dose_discrep_ge25", base_adj), collapse = " + ")
  fmla <- as.formula(sprintf("survival::Surv(%s, %s) ~ %s",
                             time_var, status_var, rhs))
  fit <- survival::coxph(fmla, data = d)

  beta_e <- unname(coef(fit)["dose_discrep_ge25"])
  se_e   <- sqrt(vcov(fit)["dose_discrep_ge25", "dose_discrep_ge25"])
  hr     <- exp(beta_e)
  lcl    <- exp(beta_e - 1.96 * se_e)
  ucl    <- exp(beta_e + 1.96 * se_e)
  pval   <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(beta_e / se_e)))
  p_str  <- ifelse(pval < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", pval))
  subtitle_str <- sprintf(
    "Discrep >= +25 vs <+25: HR = %.2f (95%% CI %.2f-%.2f), p = %s   (Cox PH)",
    hr, lcl, ucl, p_str
  )

  d0 <- d; d0$dose_discrep_ge25 <- 0
  d1 <- d; d1$dose_discrep_ge25 <- 1

  sf0 <- survival::survfit(fit, newdata = d0)
  sf1 <- survival::survfit(fit, newdata = d1)

  s0 <- if (is.matrix(sf0$surv)) sf0$surv else as.matrix(sf0$surv)
  s1 <- if (is.matrix(sf1$surv)) sf1$surv else as.matrix(sf1$surv)

  cif0 <- 1 - rowMeans(s0)
  cif1 <- 1 - rowMeans(s1)

  df <- bind_rows(
    tibble(time = sf0$time, cif = cif0, group = "Discrep < +25 mg"),
    tibble(time = sf1$time, cif = cif1, group = "Discrep >= +25 mg")
  )

  ymax <- max(df$cif, na.rm = TRUE)

  ggplot(df, aes(x = time, y = cif, color = group)) +
    geom_step(linewidth = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Discrep < +25 mg"  = "#1F78B4",
                                  "Discrep >= +25 mg" = "#E31A1C")) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, max(0.05, ymax * 1.05))) +
    labs(x = "Days from baseline",
         y = "Cumulative incidence (1 - S)",
         color = NULL,
         title = label,
         subtitle = subtitle_str) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(legend.position = "top",
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey25"))
}

Code

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)

15 Paper

A total of 157 (33.9%) patients received an excess dose of carboplatin, defined as ≥ 25 mg higher than the dose that would have been predicted using the CKD-EPI eGFRCR-CYS equation adjusted for actual BSA.

(Denominator: 463 carboplatin AUC ≥ 3 patients with a computable predicted dose.)

16 Sensitivity Analysis — eGFR Ratio (CKD-EPI 2012 CysC / CKD-EPI 2021 Cr) (Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)

Sensitivity analysis using an alternative eGFR ratio definition for the linear exposure:

  • Numerator: eGFRCYS — CKD-EPI 2012 cystatin C-only equation (baseline_cys_c_egfr_unindexed)
  • Denominator: eGFRCR — CKD-EPI 2021 race-free creatinine-only equation (baseline_cre_egfr_unindexed)
  • Ratio: egfr_ratio_sens = baseline_cys_c_egfr_unindexed / baseline_cre_egfr_unindexed

One row per outcome. Multivariable Fine-Gray model fit with egfr_ratio_sens_per10 = -egfr_ratio_sens * 10 plus the same adjuster set as Section 5 (no platin_group in the AUC ≥ 3 cohort). The HR for this variable reads as the multiplicative subHR per 0.1 unit lower sensitivity eGFR ratio. 90-day death uses Cox PH. p-values in this summary table are raw Wald (not Bonferroni-adjusted); the plot subtitles in Sections 16.1–16.11 apply Bonferroni correction across the six primary AE outcomes.

📄 Download Word table

Code 
.sens_adj_set <- function(pre_labs = NULL) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2","cockcroft",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  if (!is.null(pre_labs)) base_adj <- c(base_adj, pre_labs)
  base_adj
}

fg_sens_row <- function(time_var, status_var, label, pre_labs = NULL) {
  adj <- .sens_adj_set(pre_labs)
  d <- dat %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c("egfr_ratio_sens_per10", time_var, status_var, adj))) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na()
  adj_df <- d[, adj, drop = FALSE]
  X_adj  <- model.matrix(~ ., data = adj_df)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  X      <- cbind(egfr_ratio_sens_per10 = d$egfr_ratio_sens_per10, X_adj)
  stat_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(d[[status_var]])))
  time_num <- as.numeric(d[[time_var]])
  fit <- cmprsk::crr(time_num, stat_num, cov1 = X, failcode = 1)
  b <- unname(fit$coef[1]); se <- sqrt(fit$var[1, 1])
  hr <- exp(b); lcl <- exp(b - 1.96 * se); ucl <- exp(b + 1.96 * se)
  pv <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(b / se)))
  tibble(
    Outcome = label,
    Model   = "Fine-Gray",
    N       = nrow(d),
    `Excluded (missing cov.)` = nrow(dat) - nrow(d),
    Events  = sum(stat_num == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    `(sub)HR (95% CI)` = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)", hr, lcl, ucl),
    `p-value` = ifelse(pv < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", pv))
  )
}

cox_sens_row <- function(time_var, status_var, label, pre_labs = NULL) {
  adj <- .sens_adj_set(pre_labs)
  d <- dat %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c("egfr_ratio_sens_per10", time_var, status_var, adj))) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na()
  fmla <- as.formula(paste0("Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var,
                            ") ~ egfr_ratio_sens_per10 + ",
                            paste(adj, collapse = " + ")))
  fit <- survival::coxph(fmla, data = d)
  b   <- unname(coef(fit)["egfr_ratio_sens_per10"])
  se  <- sqrt(vcov(fit)["egfr_ratio_sens_per10", "egfr_ratio_sens_per10"])
  hr  <- exp(b); lcl <- exp(b - 1.96 * se); ucl <- exp(b + 1.96 * se)
  pv  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(b / se)))
  tibble(
    Outcome = label,
    Model   = "Cox PH",
    N       = nrow(d),
    `Excluded (missing cov.)` = nrow(dat) - nrow(d),
    Events  = sum(d[[status_var]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    `(sub)HR (95% CI)` = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)", hr, lcl, ucl),
    `p-value` = ifelse(pv < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", pv))
  )
}

sens_summary <- bind_rows(
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_anemia_2",     "cmp_status_anemia_2",     "Anemia Grade 2",                   "pre_HGB_45days"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_anemia_3",     "cmp_status_anemia_3",     "Anemia Grade 3",                   "pre_HGB_45days"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_throm_2",      "cmp_status_throm_2",      "Thrombocytopenia Grade 2",         "pre_PLT_45days"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_throm_3",      "cmp_status_throm_3",      "Thrombocytopenia Grade 3",         "pre_PLT_45days"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_aki_2",        "cmp_status_aki_2",        "AKI Grade 2"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_aki_kdigo",    "cmp_status_aki_kdigo",    "AKI (KDIGO)"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_grade_2_aes",  "cmp_status_grade_2_aes",  "Composite Grade 2 AEs"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_grade_3_aes",  "cmp_status_grade_3_aes",  "Composite Grade 3 AEs"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_any_hosp",     "cmp_status_any_hosp",     "Overall Hospitalization"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_side_effect",  "cmp_status_side_effect",  "Platinum-Related Hospitalization"),
  cox_sens_row("time_to_death_90",      "death_90",                "90-Day Death")
)

ft_sens <- flextable::flextable(sens_summary) |>
  flextable::set_caption("Sensitivity analysis: multivariable (sub)HR per 0.1 decline in eGFR ratio (CKD-EPI 2012 CysC / CKD-EPI 2021 Cr) — Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3 cohort. Fine-Gray for competing-risk outcomes; Cox PH for 90-day death.") |>
  flextable::autofit()
flextable::save_as_docx(ft_sens,
  path = file.path(docx_dir, "sec16_egfr_ratio_sens_summary.docx"))

Code 
plot_subhr_linear_sens <- function(time_var, status_var, extra_adj = NULL,
                                   outcome_label, n_bonf = 6) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2","cockcroft",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  keep <- c("egfr_ratio_sens", time_var, status_var, base_adj, extra_adj)
  d <- dat %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  adj_df <- d[, c(base_adj, extra_adj), drop = FALSE]
  X_adj <- model.matrix(~ ., data = adj_df)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  X <- cbind(egfr_ratio_sens = d$egfr_ratio_sens, X_adj)

  stat_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(d[[status_var]])))
  time_num <- as.numeric(d[[time_var]])

  fit <- cmprsk::crr(ftime = time_num, fstatus = stat_num,
                     cov1 = X, failcode = 1)

  beta   <- fit$coef[1]
  V_beta <- fit$var[1, 1]
  se_b   <- sqrt(V_beta)

  q1    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_ratio_sens, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))
  q3    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_ratio_sens, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
  iqr_w <- q3 - q1
  hr01  <- exp(-0.1 * beta);     hr01_l <- exp(-0.1 * beta - 1.96 * 0.1 * se_b);   hr01_u <- exp(-0.1 * beta + 1.96 * 0.1 * se_b)
  hri   <- exp(-iqr_w * beta);   hri_l  <- exp(-iqr_w * beta - 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b); hri_u <- exp(-iqr_w * beta + 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b)
  pval  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(beta / se_b)))
  pval_bonf <- min(pval * n_bonf, 1)
  p_shown <- if (n_bonf > 1) pval_bonf else pval
  p_lbl   <- if (n_bonf > 1) sprintf("p_Bonf = %s (n = %d)", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)), n_bonf) else sprintf("p = %s", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)))
  subtitle_str <- sprintf(
    "subHR per 0.1 ratio decline: %.2f (%.2f-%.2f), %s  |  per IQR decline (Δ = %.2f): %.2f (%.2f-%.2f)  |  IQR: [%.2f, %.2f]",
    hr01, hr01_l, hr01_u, p_lbl, iqr_w, hri, hri_l, hri_u, q1, q3)

  ref_x  <- median(d$egfr_ratio_sens, na.rm = TRUE)
  grid_x <- seq(quantile(d$egfr_ratio_sens, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
                quantile(d$egfr_ratio_sens, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100)

  log_hr <- beta * (grid_x - ref_x)
  se     <- sqrt((grid_x - ref_x)^2 * V_beta)

  df_plot <- tibble(
    x     = grid_x,
    subhr = exp(log_hr),
    lcl   = exp(log_hr - 1.96 * se),
    ucl   = exp(log_hr + 1.96 * se)
  )

  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = x, y = subhr)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lcl, ymax = ucl), alpha = 0.2, fill = "darkorange") +
    geom_line(color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = ref_x, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey40") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(q1, q3), linetype = "dashed",
               color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    labs(x = "Sensitivity eGFR Ratio (CKD-EPI 2012 CysC / CKD-EPI 2021 Cr)",
         y = "subHR (95% CI)",
         title = outcome_label,
         subtitle = subtitle_str) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey25"))
}

plot_cox_linear_sens <- function(time_var, status_var, extra_adj = NULL,
                                 outcome_label, n_bonf = 6) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2","cockcroft",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  keep <- c("egfr_ratio_sens", time_var, status_var, base_adj, extra_adj)
  d <- dat %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  fmla <- as.formula(paste0(
    "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var, ") ~ egfr_ratio_sens + ",
    paste(c(base_adj, extra_adj), collapse = " + ")
  ))
  fit <- survival::coxph(fmla, data = d)

  beta   <- coef(fit)["egfr_ratio_sens"]
  V_beta <- vcov(fit)["egfr_ratio_sens", "egfr_ratio_sens"]
  se_b   <- sqrt(V_beta)

  q1    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_ratio_sens, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))
  q3    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_ratio_sens, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
  iqr_w <- q3 - q1
  hr01  <- exp(-0.1 * beta);     hr01_l <- exp(-0.1 * beta - 1.96 * 0.1 * se_b);   hr01_u <- exp(-0.1 * beta + 1.96 * 0.1 * se_b)
  hri   <- exp(-iqr_w * beta);   hri_l  <- exp(-iqr_w * beta - 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b); hri_u <- exp(-iqr_w * beta + 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b)
  pval  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(beta / se_b)))
  pval_bonf <- min(pval * n_bonf, 1)
  p_shown <- if (n_bonf > 1) pval_bonf else pval
  p_lbl   <- if (n_bonf > 1) sprintf("p_Bonf = %s (n = %d)", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)), n_bonf) else sprintf("p = %s", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)))
  subtitle_str <- sprintf(
    "HR per 0.1 ratio decline: %.2f (%.2f-%.2f), %s  |  per IQR decline (Δ = %.2f): %.2f (%.2f-%.2f)  |  IQR: [%.2f, %.2f]",
    hr01, hr01_l, hr01_u, p_lbl, iqr_w, hri, hri_l, hri_u, q1, q3)

  ref_x  <- median(d$egfr_ratio_sens, na.rm = TRUE)
  grid_x <- seq(quantile(d$egfr_ratio_sens, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
                quantile(d$egfr_ratio_sens, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100)

  log_hr <- beta * (grid_x - ref_x)
  se     <- sqrt((grid_x - ref_x)^2 * V_beta)

  df_plot <- tibble(
    x   = grid_x,
    hr  = exp(log_hr),
    lcl = exp(log_hr - 1.96 * se),
    ucl = exp(log_hr + 1.96 * se)
  )

  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = x, y = hr)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lcl, ymax = ucl), alpha = 0.2, fill = "darkorange") +
    geom_line(color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = ref_x, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey40") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(q1, q3), linetype = "dashed",
               color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    labs(x = "Sensitivity eGFR Ratio (CKD-EPI 2012 CysC / CKD-EPI 2021 Cr)",
         y = "HR (95% CI)",
         title = outcome_label,
         subtitle = subtitle_str) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey25"))
}

16.1 Anemia Grade 2

Code 
plot_subhr_linear_sens("cmp_time_anemia_2", "cmp_status_anemia_2",
                       "pre_HGB_45days", "Anemia Grade 2 (Sensitivity, Carboplatin AUC ≥ 3)")

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)
